{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203483125526441D7AB314915C4"}"},"total":1004},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6983262442604774151","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的爽文，文笔还不错。挺吸引我的，很少跳着看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625917493,"group_id":"6933028682785098765","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7Hg4mVN9gbTQh91LHdD44yflc3qeONC+KJG7H/pebvu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2084298963844798","user_name":"用户20842989"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2084298963844798","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6933028682785098765","book_info":{"abstract":"林轩穿越到了洪荒世界，激活了无敌天道系统，达到了无敌的大道境界，但自己却不知道。
他养的狗因为每天吃他做的饭菜，看起来是土狗，其实是圣人境。
他种的果实和茶树，日日受他熏陶，比之十大先天灵根还要恐怖。
一日，系统离去，林轩悲号，觉得自己是个凡人根本不可能在即将到来的封神量劫之中活下去。凡人和土狗相依为命，打猎为生。
却不曾想，弹弓弹下了一只大鸟——竟然万妖之师鲲鹏。
三界震动，大能纷纷来拜这看起来平凡的小院，觉得林轩是绝顶大能。
这玩笑开大了！林轩觉得自己一个凡人，只想活下去......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/64eeff8b1a89330fa31da8a27755348d","author":"感伤的秋季","author_id":"","book_id":"6933028682785098765","book_name":"洪荒之开局炖了鲲鹏妖师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8831人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6933612336528032269","read_count":"8831","title_pag
